## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content addition (new section/topic)
- [ ] Content improvement (clarification, better examples)
- [ ] Correction (factual fix)
- [ ] Broken link fix
- [ ] Formatting/typo fix
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Content follows the voice guidelines (practical, opinionated, evidence-based)
- [ ] TL;DR sections are 5 bullets or fewer
- [ ] Code examples are practical and tested
- [ ] External links include archive.org fallbacks for blog posts
- [ ] Cross-references use relative links
- [ ] No AI/Claude attribution in content

## Additional Notes

Any context reviewers should know.
